attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/25XEL/2017-06-30/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/25XEL/2017-07-16/Seq01/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (0.2293, 0.1807) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/16.0 = 0.6.
attrs.history:
2018-06-11 16:58:08 | Combined 3 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/25XEL/2017-06-30_to_2017-07-14/2017-06-30_Seq00_to_2017-07-16_Seq01.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/25XEL/2017-06-30_to_2017-07-14/2017-07-01_Seq05_to_2017-07-13_Seq00.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/25XEL/2017-06-30_to_2017-07-14/2017-06-30_Seq04_to_2017-07-12_Seq02.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.

2018-06-11 17:00:07 | Stacked in time from 3 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/25XEL/2017-06-30_to_2017-07-14.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/25XEL/2017-07-15_to_2017-07-29.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/25XEL/2017-07-30_to_2017-08-14.nc'].
attrs.summary: Ice Velocity time series of Hagen Glacier from Sentinel-2 data acquired between the 2017-06-30 and 2017-08-14
attrs.title: Hagen_TimeSeries_20170630_20170814
